title: Gamingecke Summer 2024 Neoforged
description: Our Vanilla+ modpack offers a unique gaming experience – now updated to Minecraft 1.21.1 with NeoForge (instead of Forge). It aims to deliver an unforgettable adventure while staying true to the Vanilla+ spirit.
body:
Welcome to Summer 2024 Neoforged! Our **Vanilla+ modpack** invites players to a unique gaming experience. Immerse yourself in a world of exciting adventures and relaxing moments as you explore our updated custom modpack. Experience summer with **a dash of technology** and discover how we take the traditional Minecraft experience to a new level.

**Now updated to Minecraft 1.21.1 and NeoForge, this modpack continues to deliver an unforgettable Vanilla+ adventure.**
